title: Vstrecha na Elbe
writer: Lev Sheynin, Leonid Tur, Pyotr Tur
actors: Vladlen Davydov, Konstantin Nassonov, Boris Andreyev
plot: After the historic April 1945 meeting at the Elbe River in enemy Germany of the allied US and USSR troops, things go sour, the Americans reject Russian friendship,and begin to reinstall the Fascists in their new ally of West Germany.
